name: CT-Guided Drainage
description: Interventional radiology CT-guided drainage procedure report template

findings.technique: CT-guided percutaneous drainage catheter placement performed using [8F/10F/12F] catheter. Patient positioned [prone/supine/lateral] for optimal access to [collection location]. Pre-procedure CT demonstrates [X]cm [fluid collection/abscess] in [location].
findings.comparison: Pre-procedure imaging shows [fluid collection description] concerning for [abscess/seroma/lymphocele].

sections.name: Target Assessment
sections.content: Target fluid collection measured approximately [X]cm in greatest dimension. Located [X]cm from skin surface. Adjacent structures: [list adjacent organs/vessels].

sections.name: Access Route
sections.content: [Posterior/Anterior/Lateral] approach selected to avoid [lung/pleura/bowel/vessel]. Safe trajectory confirmed on planning images.

sections.name: Drainage Procedure
sections.content: Local anesthesia with [lidocaine] administered. [Trocar/Seldinger] technique used to advance drainage catheter into collection. [X]ml of [purulent/bloody/serous] fluid aspirated. Catheter successfully positioned.

sections.name: Post-Procedure
sections.content: Post-procedure CT confirms catheter tip within collection with [no residual pneumothorax/small pneumothorax/hematoma]. Catheter secured to skin with [sutures/adhesive].

impression:
1. CT-guided percutaneous drainage of [location] fluid collection performed.
2. [X]ml of [purulent/bloody/serous] fluid aspirated.
3. [X]F drainage catheter successfully placed and secured.
4. [No immediate complications / Complications as noted]: [describe].
5. Drain output to be monitored. Catheter to remain until output <[X]ml/day.
author: RadReport Templates
